studio@annaljung.se

Stockholm, Sweden

Portrait

Anna
Ljung

Anna Ljung works at the intersection of sculpture and textile. Each piece begins as colour — hand-dyed, hand-formed, never repeated.

Every work is finished when it is finished. No two pieces are ever the same. Not because we try — but because they can't be.

Studio — Alvik, Stockholm

News

May 2026

Nordic Mood, Copenhagen

Anna's work will be shown at Nordic Mood, Copenhagen, from 22 May. A selection of Kinetic Bloom pieces — each unique, each in the room for the first time.

April 2026

New works in preparation

The studio has been quiet. New pieces are forming — some already named, some still deciding what colour they want to be.

March 2026

A quiet acquisition

A piece found its home with a collector in Stockholm. No announcement — only a note that it has left the studio.

Art Lessons

A space to look, to mix, to understand colour and form. Small groups. No experience necessary.

Evening — Colour Theory

Three hours. Pigment, perception, and the language of colour.

950 €per person · max 8

Evening — Drawing

Three hours. Mark-making, proportion, and seeing clearly.

950 €per person · max 8

Course — Four Evenings

An extended exploration across four sessions. Space to develop a personal practice.

3 800 €per person · max 8

Corporate Workshop

A session designed for teams. Colour, creativity, and presence — in a room together.

15 000 €+up to 20 people
